headline: Six neighbourhoods, six rhythms of remote work.
subheadline: Bangkok isn't one city for nomads — it's a half-dozen overlapping ones. We walked the sois, tested the cafés, and measured the late-night quiet so you can pick the zone that actually fits how you work.

zones.name: Ari
zones.tagline: Leafy mid-rise streets where third-wave cafés outnumber 7-Elevens. Quiet enough for deep work, close enough to central Bangkok.
field_notes: BTS Ari puts you 15 minutes from any major cowork hub.
Most cafés enforce a minimum spend on busy afternoons.
Street noise is light — the biggest interruption is a rooster two sois over.
zones.summary: Leafy mid-rise streets where third-wave cafés outnumber 7-Elevens.

zones.name: Phrom Phong
zones.tagline: Polished, international and call-ready. Glass towers, EmSphere, and the quietest premium condo stock on Sukhumvit.
field_notes: Look for condos with double-glazed windows away from Soi 24.
EmQuartier and EmSphere co-working floors are excellent for client calls.

zones.name: Ekkamai
zones.tagline: Design-led café culture meets late-night bar life. Great for creative work mornings; loud by 9 pm.
field_notes: Café density is high but competition for power sockets is real.
Evening noise rises sharply — plan calls before 6 pm.
Strong local food scene makes long stays easy to sustain.
zones.summary: Design-led café culture meets late-night bar life.

zones.name: On Nut
zones.tagline: The budget-savvy long-stay belt. Modern condos, expanding café scene, and one BTS stop further from the noise.
field_notes: Habito Mall and the W District cluster cover daily needs.
Rent runs 25–35% below Phrom Phong for comparable specs.

zones.name: Silom
zones.tagline: Business-district energy by day, Patpong neon by night. High connectivity, premium cowork options, but it's not the quietest base.
field_notes: Lumpini Park is walkable — a genuine respite for outdoor focus sessions.
Street-level noise is significant; prioritise upper-floor accommodation.
Some of Bangkok's best cowork spaces are in Sathorn, a short walk away.
zones.summary: Business-district energy by day, Patpong neon by night.

zones.name: Old Town
zones.tagline: Rattanakosin's temple lanes and riverfront. Romantic and photogenic, but remote-work infrastructure is thin.
field_notes: Cowork options are limited — plan to commute to Silom or Ari for serious work days.
River views and temple acoustics make for exceptional non-screen focus.
Ideal as a base for the first or last week of a longer Bangkok stay.
